functions.name: confettii.ncc_helper.norm_data
documentation: normalize data to have mean=0 and standard_deviation=1

functions.name: confettii.ncc_helper.ncc
documentation:
normalized cross-correlation coefficient between two data sets

Parameters
----------
data0, data1 :  numpy arrays of same size

functions.name: confettii.ncc_helper.get_ncc_point_to_whole
documentation:
calculate the ncc between feature at pos and the other features in feat_list
return the ncc_map, notice: only accept "square"feature list

Parameters
----------
pos: the position of the sample point on ori_feats_map
ori_feats: a feature_list
